packageRules.description: TeamSpeak 6 server only ships pre-release tags (6.0.0-betaN). With semver/docker versioning the -betaN suffix is compared lexically, so 6.0.0-beta10 sorts BELOW 6.0.0-beta9 and license-refresh bumps are missed. Use regex versioning with a numeric <build> group so the beta number orders numerically, and automerge so refreshes land before the license expires. Revisit when TeamSpeak 6 leaves beta.
